'''satobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaderette|leaderette]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaderette|leaderette]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| satobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sætebeth|sætebeth]] || [[word:sætebej|sætebej]] || [[word:sætebesh|sætebesh]] || [[word:sætebe|sætebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:satotoboth|satotoboth]] || [[word:satotoboj|satotoboj]] || [[word:satotobosh|satotobosh]] || [[word:satotobo|satotobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:satoboth|satoboth]] || [[word:satoboj|satoboj]] || [[word:satobosh|satobosh]] || [[word:satobo|satobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:satofboth|satofboth]] || [[word:satofboj|satofboj]] || [[word:satofbosh|satofbosh]] || [[word:satofbof|satofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:satobotho|satobotho]] || [[word:satobojo|satobojo]] || [[word:satobosho|satobosho]] || [[word:satoboko|satoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:satoboth|satoboth]] || [[word:satoboj|satoboj]] || [[word:satobosh|satobosh]] || [[word:satobo|satobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:satobothol|satobothol]] || [[word:satobojol|satobojol]] || [[word:satoboshol|satoboshol]] || [[word:satobokol|satobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:satobothotho|satobothotho]] || [[word:satobojojo|satobojojo]] || [[word:satoboshosho|satoboshosho]] || [[word:satoboko|satoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:satobothon|satobothon]] || [[word:satobojon|satobojon]] || [[word:satoboshon|satoboshon]] || [[word:satobokon|satobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:satobothoro|satobothoro]] || [[word:satobojoro|satobojoro]] || [[word:satoboshoro|satoboshoro]] || [[word:satobokoro|satobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
